Ticket
INTRD-27746 — [VAT recognition - 432 : Paid to date] 1. Configuration
Pull Request
#14831 — Feature/INTRD-27746 VAT recognition configuration

Zakaria BARIKI

feature/INTRD-27746_VAT_recognition_configuration → dev

oc-core-reviewer (backend)
State
OPEN
Files Changed
13 files
5
Needs Work
Several issues to address before merge
The PR adds VAT recognition configuration fields to the Tax entity, with proper Liquibase migrations, error handling, and test coverage. The structural additions are mostly correct. However, there is a runtime type mismatch bug in the update method, an asymmetric create/update validation logic gap, and a Liquibase precondition flaw that could leave databases inconsistent. These must be resolved before merge.
! Critical Issues (Must Fix Before Merge)

These issues must be resolved before the PR can be approved.

1. Type mismatch bug in TaxApi.update() — isNotBlank called with Object instead of String
opencell-api/src/main/java/org/meveo/api/TaxApi.java
Problem: isNotBlank(input.getCollectedVatOnReceiptAccountingCode()) passes an AccountingCodeResponse object to isNotBlank() which expects a String. This will either always evaluate to true (making the guard ineffective) or throw a ClassCastException at runtime.
Impact: Runtime bug — update validation will not work correctly. 
// Before (current code)
if (isNotBlank(input.getCollectedVatOnReceiptAccountingCode())
        || isNotBlank(input.getPendingVatAccountingCode())) {

// After (suggested fix)
if (input.getPendingVatAccountingCode() != null
        || input.getCollectedVatOnReceiptAccountingCode() != null) {
    addVatInfoIfRequired(tax, input.getPendingVatAccountingCode(),
            input.getCollectedVatOnReceiptAccountingCode());
}
2. Asymmetric create/update behavior for VAT info validation
opencell-api/src/main/java/org/meveo/api/TaxApi.java
Problem: In create(), addVatInfoIfRequired() is called unconditionally, but in update() it is guarded by the broken isNotBlank check. A user could update a Tax entity and silently skip VAT accounting code validation even when PAID_TO_DATE mode is active.
Impact: Data integrity — Tax entities could lose required VAT accounting codes on update. 
// Fix: Call addVatInfoIfRequired() unconditionally in update(),
// same as in create(), or explicitly handle preserving
// existing codes when not provided in the update payload.
3. Liquibase precondition checks both codes in single query — partial insert risk
opencell-model/src/main/resources/db_resources/changelog/current/structure.xml
Problem: The precondition SELECT count(*) FROM billing_accounting_code WHERE code IN ('44574', '44580') checks both codes at once. If one exists but not the other, expectedResult="0" fails and both inserts are skipped via MARK_RAN.
Impact: Database could be left with only one of the two required accounting codes. 
// Fix: Split into two separate changesets, each with its own precondition
<changeSet id="INTRD-27746_20260324_insert_44574" author="ZBariki">
    <preConditions onFail="MARK_RAN">
        <sqlCheck expectedResult="0">
            SELECT count(*) FROM billing_accounting_code WHERE code = '44574'
        </sqlCheck>
    </preConditions>
    <insert tableName="billing_accounting_code">...</insert>
</changeSet>

<changeSet id="INTRD-27746_20260324_insert_44580" author="ZBariki">
    <preConditions onFail="MARK_RAN">
        <sqlCheck expectedResult="0">
            SELECT count(*) FROM billing_accounting_code WHERE code = '44580'
        </sqlCheck>
    </preConditions>
    <insert tableName="billing_accounting_code">...</insert>
</changeSet>
~ Warnings (Should Fix)

These won't block the merge but should be addressed for code quality.

1. Liquibase changeset IDs use # prefix — inconsistent
opencell-model/src/main/resources/db_resources/changelog/current/structure.xml
Issue: IDs #INTRD-27746_20260324 use a # prefix not seen in other changesets (e.g., INTRD-41376-2026_03_16). 
// Fix: Remove # prefix
<changeSet id="#INTRD-27746_20260324" ...>
<changeSet id="INTRD-27746_20260324" ...>
2. Unused import in TaxDto.java
opencell-api-dto/src/main/java/org/meveo/api/dto/TaxDto.java
Issue: AccountingCodeDto is imported but never used. Only AccountingCodeResponse is used.
3. Error message typo in MeveoApiErrorCodeEnum
opencell-api-dto/src/main/java/org/meveo/api/MeveoApiErrorCodeEnum.java
Issue: ACCOUNTING_CODE_NOT_FOUND Javadoc reads "AccountingCode with does not exist" — missing the code placeholder.
4. AccountingCodeResponse class may be redundant
opencell-api-dto/src/main/java/org/meveo/api/dto/billing/AccountingCodeResponse.java
Issue: This class extends BusinessEntityDto and only adds a two-arg constructor. AccountingCodeDto already got a similar constructor in this PR. Consider reusing AccountingCodeDto or adding class-level Javadoc explaining the read/write model distinction.
5. addVatInfoIfRequired queries database on every create/update
opencell-api/src/main/java/org/meveo/api/TaxApi.java
Issue: Every Tax create/update calls einvoiceSettingService.findEinvoiceSetting() even when PAID_TO_DATE mode is not active. This is an unnecessary DB hit for most deployments.
6. Error code Javadoc inconsistency
opencell-api-dto/src/main/java/org/meveo/api/MeveoApiErrorCodeEnum.java
Issue: COLLECTED_VAT_ON_RECEIPT_ACCOUNTING_CODE_MISSING Javadoc says "code (44580)" but 44580 is the pending VAT code. The collected code is 44574.
+ Suggestions (Nice to Have)

Optional improvements that would enhance the code.

  • Tax.java: Consider @BatchSize on the new LAZY ManyToOne fields to avoid N+1 queries if Tax entities are loaded in bulk.
  • TaxApi.java: The postData → input rename in update() is fine but inconsistent with create() and the rest of the codebase.
  • TaxApiTest.java: Missing test for update() when PAID_TO_DATE is active. Also no test for the type mismatch scenario.
  • Postman collection: 2857-line Postman JSON may be better managed in a shared workspace rather than source control.
✓ What's Done Well
  • LAZY fetch strategy on new ManyToOne relationships — correct default for optional associations
  • Proper JoinColumn annotations with explicit column names and FK constraint names
  • Clean addVatInfoIfRequired method encapsulating VAT validation logic
  • Liquibase updated in both current/ and rebuild/ paths
  • 4 new well-structured test methods covering key VAT scenarios
  • Proper error code additions mapped in ExceptionProcessorRs
  • Defensive instanceof MeveoApiException check in TaxRsImpl prevents double-wrapping
  • Static import cleanup improves readability across the codebase
Review Breakdown
Category Status Notes
Jakarta EE Compliance Pass No javax.* usage, proper Jakarta imports
Entity Layer Pass Correct ManyToOne LAZY, proper JoinColumns
Service Layer Fail Type mismatch bug in update(), asymmetric validation
API Layer Warn addVatInfoIfRequired queries DB unconditionally
DTO Layer Warn Redundant AccountingCodeResponse, unused import
Mapper Methods Pass Null-safe entity-to-DTO mapping in TaxDto
REST Endpoints Pass Proper MeveoApiException handling in TaxRsImpl
Liquibase Fail # prefix inconsistency, precondition flaw
Unit Tests Warn Good coverage for create, missing update tests
Code Quality Warn Typo in enum Javadoc, unused import
Performance Pass LAZY fetch, no obvious N+1 risk
Security Pass No SQL injection vectors, proper input validation

Request Changes

Please address the 3 critical issues (type mismatch bug, asymmetric create/update, Liquibase precondition) and re-request review.
